series_metadata.series_description: This records series contains all written agreements with ODE, including Contracts, Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), Inter-agency Agreements, Win-Win Agreements, Personal Service Contracts or any such document where a vendor, entity or party enters into a written, expressed contract with ODE wherein all parties involved have signed to demonstrate they agree with all stated provisions, ideas, and stipulations. This series also includes the ODE Agency Approvals/Denials Signature page and correspondence with the vendor.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 8 years from the date of expiration or cancellation per ORC 2305.6., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
